about.title: About My Journey
about.description: Experienced and results-oriented Senior .NET Developer with over 9 years of expertise in designing, developing, and deploying scalable, data-centric web applications for ERP, CRM, and enterprise platforms.

achievements: Led modernization of legacy WPF ERP to .NET 8 microservices, achieving 40% performance improvement
Reduced deployment downtime by 50% through microservices architecture
Increased test coverage to 80% using NUnit and SonarQube
Migrated legacy banking systems from .NET Framework 4.0 to .NET 6
Implemented CI/CD pipelines with Azure DevOps and Jenkins
Set up centralized logging with Splunk and Azure Monitor
Developed AI-enhanced media platform with AWS Rekognition
Integrated OpenAI API for intelligent search and metadata extraction
Built Angular-based interfaces with RxJS for real-time processing
Developed B2B ERP and CRM solutions using ASP.NET MVC 5
Built interactive UIs with Kendo UI and jQuery
Optimized SQL Server stored procedures and SSRS reports
Developed full-stack B2B ERP solutions
Created interactive chart visualization bot using Google Charts
Built REST APIs for third-party integrations

list.title: ERP System Modernization
list.description: Migrated legacy WPF ERP application to modern .NET 8 microservices architecture. This involved decoupling monolithic services into scalable modules, optimizing database queries, and implementing a modern Angular frontend.
achievements: 40% performance improvement in data processing
50% reduction in deployment downtime via CI/CD
80% unit test coverage with NUnit

list.title: AI Media Platform
list.description: Developed a cloud-native media management platform that leverages AI for automated metadata extraction and facial analysis. Used AWS Rekognition for image analysis and OpenAI for intelligent content search.
achievements: Integrated AWS Rekognition for facial analysis
OpenAI API for intelligent search capabilities
Real-time processing dashboards for media assets

list.title: Banking System Migration
list.description: Led the migration of critical banking systems from .NET Framework 4.0 to .NET 6. The project focused on high availability, security compliance, and performance optimization for high-volume transactions.
achievements: Significant improvement in system scalability
Fully automated CI/CD pipelines with Azure DevOps
Centralized logging and monitoring with Splunk

list.title: Affiliate Marketplace
list.description: Architected and built a serverless marketplace platform using Next.js and Supabase. Designed for high scalability to handle seasonal traffic spikes while maintaining low latency for global users.
achievements: API-first serverless architecture on Vercel
Integrated payment gateways and merchant dashboards
Dynamic scaling to handle 10x traffic spikes
